creator: freebsd.tug890@passmail.net
text:
Hi,
I cannot upgrade minecraft-server port.

# portmaster -d minecraft-server

===>>> Currently installed version: minecraft-server-1.12.2
===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/games/minecraft-server

===>>> Gathering distinfo list for installed ports

===>>> Launching 'make checksum' for games/minecraft-server in background
===>>> Gathering dependency list for games/minecraft-server from ports
===>>> Initial dependency check complete for games/minecraft-server


===>>> Starting build for games/minecraft-server <<<===

===>>> All dependencies are up to date

===>  Cleaning for minecraft-server-1.13
===>  License minecraft needs confirmation, will ask later
===>   minecraft-server-1.13 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> server.jar doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles//minecraft-server-1.13.
=> Attempting to fetch https://launcher.mojang.com/mc/game/1.13/server/d0caafb8438ebd206f99930cfaecfa6c9a13dca0/server.jar
server.jar                                    100% of   31 MB   82 MBps 00m00s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by minecraft-server-1.13 for building
===>  Extracting for minecraft-server-1.13
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for minecraft-server-1.13/server.jar.
===>  Patching for minecraft-server-1.13
===>  Configuring for minecraft-server-1.13
===>  Staging for minecraft-server-1.13
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===> Creating groups.
===> Creating users
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/games/minecraft-server/work/stage/usr/local/minecraft-server
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/distfiles//server.jar /usr/ports/games/minecraft-server/work/stage/usr/local/minecraft-server
install: /usr/ports/distfiles//server.jar: No such file or directory
*** Error code 71

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/games/minecraft-server
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/games/minecraft-server

===>>> make stage failed for games/minecraft-server
===>>> Aborting update


===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> games/minecraft-server

This command has been saved to /tmp/portmasterfail.txt
